feed.title: [BIP127] announcements: removal of Proof File Format and update status to Complete

entry.title: [BIP127] announcements: removal of Proof File Format and update status to Complete
entry.summary:
The recent updates to BIP127, a specification under the Bitcoin Improvement Proposals, reflect significant changes intended to streamline and clarify its utility in the cryptocurrency ecosystem. The primary alteration involves the removal of the *Proof File Format* from the BIP127 documentation. This section was initially designed to package a set of proofs along with relevant metadata but was never fully developed or adopted by any projects. Consequently, this part has been pruned to focus more on the sections that have seen practical application and theoretical interest.
Furthermore, the status of BIP127 has been upgraded from Draft to Complete, indicating a closure on further modifications and an affirmation of its current state's stability and utility. The remaining sections, specifically the Proof Format and the PSBT Extension, continue unchanged. These elements are still recognized for their value and are reportedly being utilized in various forms within the community.
For detailed information about these updates, you can view the full pull request on GitHub titled "BIP-0127: Prune some unfinished part and mark complete" at [BIPs PR 2168](https://github.com/bitcoin/bips/pull/2168). The community is encouraged to provide feedback on these revisions and share experiences regarding the adoption or implementation of BIP127, which could help gauge its effectiveness and relevance in ongoing and future projects.
